scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.db:reset: pnpm --filter backend exec npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter backend exec npx prisma generate && pnpm --filter backend exec npx prisma migrate dev && pnpm db:seed
